title: Olo Promotions Request
description: The shared request payload sent by Olo to a promotions provider for the Validate Promotions and Redeem Promotions operations, describing an order, its totals, and its basket contents.

orderId.description: The ID of the order, only populated once the order has been placed.

accountId.description: The loyalty account's unique identifier in the provider's system.

handoff.description: The handoff method for the order.

currency.description: A three-letter ISO 4217 currency code; defaults to USD.

placed.description: A UTC RFC 3339 date-time representing when the order was created.

wanted.description: A UTC RFC 3339 date-time representing when the guest wants their food.

storeNumber.description: The ID of the store as provided by the restaurant.

restaurant.description: A unique ID representing the vendor restaurant in Olo's system.

brand.description: A unique ID representing the restaurant brand in Olo's system.

subtotal.description: The cost of the food before any tax, tip, fees or discounts.

tax.description: The amount of tax applied to the order.

tip.description: The amount the customer tipped on the order.

delivery.description: The delivery fee for the order.

customFees.description: The sum of any custom fees applied to the order.

discount.description: The sum of any discounts applied to the order.

total.description: The final total for the order after tax, tip, fees and discounts.

address.description: The destination address of the order.

payments.description: Any payments applied to the order.

suffix.description: The credit card suffix; only when tender is Credit.

amount.description: The payment amount for this payment method.

basket.description: The basket contents for an order.

id.description: The ID of the basket; the unique order identifier until an order ID is generated.

rewards.description: Any loyalty rewards applied to the basket.

coupons.description: Any coupons applied to the basket.

entries.description: The Olo representations of the basket items.

posEntries.description: The POS representations of the basket items.
